name: tersa-cli
description: Tersa opens coding-agent workflows to any LLM — OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, Ollama, and 200+ models

scripts.dev:fast: bun run profile:fast && bun run dev:ollama:fast
scripts.dev:code: bun run profile:code && bun run dev:profile
scripts.audit:branding:tersa: bun run scripts/tersa-branding-audit.ts package.json README.md docs/tester-builds.md src/entrypoints/cli.tsx src/components/LogoV2 src/components/StartupScreen.ts src/services/notifier.ts bin
scripts.test:tersa:focused: TERSA_CAVE_MODE=1 bun test --max-concurrency=1 scripts/tersa-branding-audit.test.ts scripts/tersa-cli-smoke.test.ts scripts/tersa-token-benchmarks.test.ts src/commands.test.ts src/components/ModelPicker.layout.test.ts src/utils/modes/registry.test.ts src/utils/suggestions/dollarInvocationSuggestions.test.ts src/commands/help/index.test.ts src/commands/model/model.test.tsx src/commands/modes/index.test.ts src/commands/permissions/index.test.ts src/commands/provider/provider.test.tsx src/commands/status/index.test.ts src/commands/statusline.test.ts src/components/HelpV2/General.test.tsx src/components/StartupScreen.test.ts src/services/api/codexOAuth.test.ts src/services/api/openaiUsageLimit.test.ts src/services/api/quotaErrorMessage.test.ts src/utils/caveMode/structuredCompression.test.ts src/utils/internalPromptCompression.test.ts src/utils/forkedAgent.skillCompression.test.ts
scripts.test:tersa: TERSA_CAVE_MODE=1 bun test --max-concurrency=1 scripts/tersa-branding-audit.test.ts scripts/tersa-cli-smoke.test.ts scripts/tersa-package-verify.test.ts scripts/tersa-release-gate.test.ts scripts/tersa-token-benchmarks.test.ts scripts/tersa-tui-canary.test.ts src/utils/caveMode/structuredCompression.test.ts src/utils/caveMode/toolCompression.test.ts src/utils/caveMode/queryPipeline.test.ts src/utils/caveMode/rtkRewrite.test.ts src/services/tools/toolExecution.test.ts src/utils/modes/config.test.ts src/utils/modes/overlap.test.ts src/utils/modes/registry.test.ts src/commands.test.ts src/components/ModelPicker.layout.test.ts src/utils/suggestions/dollarInvocationSuggestions.test.ts src/commands/help/index.test.ts src/commands/model/model.test.tsx src/commands/modes/index.test.ts src/commands/permissions/index.test.ts src/commands/provider/provider.test.tsx src/commands/status/index.test.ts src/commands/statusline.test.ts src/utils/tersaPaths.test.ts src/utils/tersaInstallSurfaces.test.ts src/components/HelpV2/General.test.tsx src/components/StartupScreen.test.ts src/services/api/codexOAuth.test.ts src/services/api/openaiUsageLimit.test.ts src/services/api/quotaErrorMessage.test.ts src/utils/internalPromptCompression.test.ts src/utils/forkedAgent.skillCompression.test.ts scripts/tersa-bin-heap.test.ts
scripts.check: bun run smoke && bun run test:full
scripts.build:verified: bun run build && bun run verify:privacy
scripts.hardening:check: bun run smoke && bun run doctor:runtime
scripts.hardening:strict: bun run typecheck && bun run hardening:check
